sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_utf8 (id UInt32, original String, normalized String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_utf8 (id, original, normalized) VALUES (1, 'â', normalizeUTF8NFD('â'));
UPDATE test_utf8 SET normalized = normalizeUTF8NFD(original) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, original, normalized, length(normalized) AS nfd_len FROM test_utf8 WHERE length(normalized) > 0;
SELECT id, normalizeUTF8NFD(original) AS normalized FROM test_utf8 WHERE original LIKE 'a%';
